leadText: If you were looking for the Thunderclap Pokémon, see Zeraora. Thunderclap (Japanese: じんらい Thunderclap) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is one of the signature moves of Raging Bolt.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Thunderclap has a priority of +1. If Thunderclap's target has selected a physical or special attack and has not yet had a chance to execute its move, Thunderclap will damage the target; otherwise, Thunderclap will fail. Thunderclap only depends on the move the target has selected, and is not affected by any consideration of whether the attack can actually be executed, such as status conditions like sleep or freeze or Abilities like Truant .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move's name is the same as the category of Zeraora .
